questionText: Report your organization's steel-related production outputs and capacities by product.
questionKo: Report 귀사의 steel-related production outputs 및 capacities by product.
simpleHelp: Given the wide range of different structures and configurations of steel processes covered by organizations, it is important to provide transparency on the output of key products within the sector. This contributes significantly to the understanding of emissions and emissions intensity by allowing data users and investors to know the reach of an organization's activities and understand that organizations have various levels of coverage within the sector or within a given process route.

guidance.text:
General 
Complete the table for each steel output product selected in column 1. 
Your production and capacity figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). 
If you did not have any capacity or production in the reporting year then enter 0 (zero) in the relevant field. 
Negative numbers are not allowed. 
You should apply the same logic to your boundary definition as provided in question 7.19. 
Product (column 1) 
Select the product(s) relevant to your organization's steel-related production output activities. Select as many as are applicable. You may also wish to select those with no production in the reporting year to confirm zero activity. 
Production (metric tons) (column 2) 
Enter the production in metric tons, for the product selected in column 1. 
Capacity (metric tons) (column 3) 
Enter the production capacity in metric tons, for the product selected in column 1. 
Comment (column 4) (optional) 
Use this column to provide any additional information relevant to the steel product selected in column 1.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Complete the table for each steel output product 선택 in 열 1. Your production 및 capacity figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). 만약 you did not have 하나 이상 capacity 또는 production in the 보고연도 then enter 0 (zero) in the relevant field. Negative numbers are not allowed. You 해야 합니다 apply the same logic to your boundary definition as 입력 in 문항 7.19. Product (열 1) Select the product(s) relevant to 귀사의 steel-related production output activities. Select as many as are 해당되는 경우. You may also wish to select those with no production in the 보고연도 to confirm zero activity. Production (metric tons) (열 2) Enter the production in metric tons, 에 대한 product 선택 in 열 1. Capacity (metric tons) (열 3) Enter the production capacity in metric tons, 에 대한 product 선택 in 열 1. Comment (열 4) (optional) Use this 열 to provide 하나 이상 additional information relevant to the steel product 선택 in 열 1.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Table 완성 - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.
